mapper.select: SELECT R.CHAT_ROOM_NO, R.PRODUCT_NO, R.SELLER_NO, R.BUYER_NO, R.ROOM_STATUS, R.SELLER_EXIT_YN, R.BUYER_EXIT_YN, TO_CHAR(R.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT, TO_CHAR(R.LAST_MSG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_MSG_DT, P.STATUS AS PRODUCT_STATUS FROM CHAT_ROOM R JOIN PRODUCT P ON R.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE R.CHAT_ROOM_NO = #{chatRoomNo}

SELECT R.CHAT_ROOM_NO, R.PRODUCT_NO, R.SELLER_NO, R.BUYER_NO, R.ROOM_STATUS, R.SELLER_EXIT_YN, R.BUYER_EXIT_YN, TO_CHAR(R.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DT, TO_CHAR(R.LAST_MSG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_MSG_DT, P.STATUS AS PRODUCT_STATUS FROM CHAT_ROOM R JOIN PRODUCT P ON R.PRODUCT_NO = P.PRODUCT_NO WHERE (R.SELLER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.SELLER_EXIT_YN = 'N') OR (R.BUYER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.BUYER_EXIT_YN = 'N') ORDER BY R.LAST_MSG_DT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( CHAT_ROOM_NO, PRODUCT_NO, SELLER_NO, BUYER_NO, ROOM_STATUS, SELLER_EXIT_YN, BUYER_EXIT_YN, CREATE_DT, LAST_MSG_DT ) VALUES ( #{chatRoomNo}, #{productNo}, #{sellerNo}, #{buyerNo}, 'Active', 'N', 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
